prompt: Audit the performance of the main courses page (src/app/cursos/page.tsx). Look for heavy components that should be lazy loaded and check for unnecessary re-renders in the list.

assertions.text: Identifies at least 2 components for next/dynamic
assertions.evidence: Subagent identified StatsSection, TestimonialCarousel, and ProjectInfoCompact.
Subagent explicitly suggested using React.memo for CourseCard.

assertions.text: Recommends moving static objects outside the component
assertions.evidence: Subagent identified redundant object recreation for styling mappings.
